\

- Give 3-5 synonyms suitable for IELTS learners\
- Keep difficulty moderate\
- Avoid rare words\
- Provide simple explanation in Chinese\
\

\uc0\u31034 \u20363 \u20195 \u30721 \u36923 \u36753 \
\
import \{ Document, Packer, Paragraph \} from "docx";\
\
const doc = new Document(\{\
  sections: [\
    \{\
      children: vocabList.map(\
        word => new Paragraph(`$\{word.word\} - $\{word.meaning\}`)\
      )\
    \}\
  ]\
\});\
\
